channel.title: Posts on BeyondLab
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on BeyondLab

item.title: What is a firewall and why your home network needs one
item.description: Most home networks rely on a basic router with no real firewall. Here's what a firewall actually does, why it matters, and why I run OPNsense.

item.title: How I sourced enterprise hardware for cheap
item.description: Enterprise hardware is surprisingly affordable if you know where to look and what to check. Here's how to find great deals without getting burned.

item.title: Installing Proxmox from scratch — step by step
item.description: A complete walkthrough for installing Proxmox VE on bare metal — from downloading the ISO to logging into the web interface for the first time.

item.title: Why I chose Proxmox over ESXi and Hyper-V
item.description: There are several hypervisors to choose from when building a homelab. Here's why I landed on Proxmox — and why I haven't looked back.

item.title: How to research and source homelab hardware without breaking the bank
item.description: You don't need to spend a fortune to build a capable homelab. Here's how I research, evaluate, and source hardware — and where to find the best deals.

item.title: Planning your self-hosted services — what to run and why
item.description: Before you start spinning up containers, it helps to know what you actually want to run. Here's how to think about planning your self-hosted stack — and the resource that changed how I approach it.

item.title: My homelab hardware: the HP DL380 G6 breakdown
item.description: A look at the hardware running my homelab — an HP DL380 G6 I got for free, its specs, its tradeoffs, and what I'd buy if I had to start over.

item.title: What is a homelab and why you need one
item.description: A homelab is one of the best investments you can make as an IT professional

item.title: Why I started BeyondLab
item.description: Every blog has an origin story. Here's mine — and why I think documenting your IT journey is one of the best things you can do.

item.title: Welcome to BeyondLab
item.description: Why I started BeyondLab — documenting my journey from IT support engineer to homelabber.
